violations.text: The floor in the walk-in cooler area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024
The ceiling tiles in the storefront area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/23/2025

The ceiling tiles in the sales area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Establishments is to change the ceiling tiles that are stained and in poor condition. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2023
